data.body: AC amendment: Use pass_filenames: false (matching all other hooks in .pre-commit-config.yaml). check-portability.sh discovers staged files internally via git diff --cached --name-only. The pre-commit-wrapper.sh only reads 3 positional args — pass_filenames: true would silently append unused args. Place hook after executable-guard but before format-and-lint (lightweight, fail-fast ordering).
